creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Here is a shar archive with accumulated changes for
convenience. Includes suggestion from b. f. in ports/146419.

--- a.shar begins here ---
#!/bin/sh
# This is a shell archive
echo x devel/directfb
mkdir -p devel/directfb > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x devel/directfb/files
mkdir -p devel/directfb/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x devel/directfb/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/pkg-plist << 'SHAR_END'

echo x devel/directfb/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/distinfo << 'SHAR_END'
XMD5 (DirectFB-1.4.3.tar.gz) = 223e036da906ceb4bd44708026839ff1
XSHA256 (DirectFB-1.4.3.tar.gz) = 1435aae4f0eb70252dc25ee50e51aecfdc4527f2651db5f35b34eb833fa7e978
XSIZE (DirectFB-1.4.3.tar.gz) = 2898215
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/pkg-descr << 'SHAR_END'
X   DirectFB is a graphics library which was designed with embedded systems 
X   in mind. It offers maximum hardware accelerated performance at a
X   minimum of resource usage and overhead. 
X
XWWW: http://www.directfb.org/
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/Makefile << 'SHAR_END'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	DirectFB
X# Date created:				19 October 2002
X# Whom:					Devaux Fabien <fab@gcu.info>
X#
X# $FreeBSD: ports/devel/directfb/Makefile,v 1.37 2010/03/28 06:33:02 dinoex Exp $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	directfb
XPORTVERSION=	1.4.3
XCATEGORIES=	devel
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.directfb.org/downloads/Core/${DISTNAME:R}/
XDISTNAME=	DirectFB-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	anatoly.borodin@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	Graphic development lightweight API
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	jpeg.11:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
X		png.6:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png
X
XOPTIONS=	FREETYPE2	"Enable Freetype support" On \
X		X11		"Enable X11 backend" On \
X		SDL		"Enable SDL backend" On
X
XCONFIGURE_TARGET=${ARCH:S/amd64/x86_64/}-portbld-freebsd${OSREL}
XCONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}" LDFLAGS="${PTHREAD_LIBS}"
XUSE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:22
XUSE_SDL=	sdl
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XUSE_GNOME=	gnomehack
XUSE_LDCONFIG=	yes
XUSE_PERL5=	yes
XPLIST_SUB+=	DIRECTFB_VERSION=${PORTVERSION} \
X		DIRECTFB_VER=${PORTVERSION:R}-0 \
X		DIRECTFB_SHLIBVER=${PORTVERSION:R}
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if defined(WITH_FREETYPE2)
XLIB_DEPENDS+=	freetype.9:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-freetype
XPLIST_SUB+=	FREETYPE2=""
X.else
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-freetype
XPLIST_SUB+=	FREETYPE2="@comment "
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_X11)
XUSE_XORG+=	x11 xproto
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-x11
XPLIST_SUB+=	X11=""
X.else
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-x11
XPLIST_SUB+=	X11="@comment "
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_SDL)
XUSE_SDL+=	sdl
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-sdl
XPLIST_SUB+=	SDL=""
X.else
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-sdl
XPLIST_SUB+=	SDL="@comment "
X
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_SDL) || defined(WITH_X11)
XPLIST_SUB+=	INPUTDRIVERS=""
X.else
XPLIST_SUB+=	INPUTDRIVERS="@comment "
X.endif
X
XMAN1=		directfb-csource.1 dfbg.1
XMAN5=		directfbrc.5
X
X.if ${ARCH} == "alpha"
XBROKEN=		Does not compile on alpha
X.endif
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/-lc_r/${PTHREAD_LIBS}/g ; \
X		s/-lpthread/${PTHREAD_LIBS}/g ; s|%%LTMAIN%%|${LTMAIN}|g' \
X		-e 's|/usr/local|${LOCALBASE}|g' \
X			${WRKSRC}/configure
X	@${GREP} -lr alloca\.h ${WRKSRC} | ${XARGS} \
X	   ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|<alloca\.h>|<stdlib.h>|g'
X
Xtest:
X	@${ECHO_CMD} ${DISTNAME:S/-${DISTVERSION}//}
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-src-misc-conf.h
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-src-misc-conf.h << 'SHAR_END'
X--- src/misc/conf.h.orig	2007-12-15 15:16:37.000000000 +0200
X+++ src/misc/conf.h	2008-03-16 16:43:14.000000000 +0200
X@@ -38,6 +38,9 @@
X #include <core/coredefs.h>
X 
X 
X+typedef unsigned long ulong;
X+
X+
X typedef struct {
X      bool                                init;
X 
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-conf.c
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-conf.c << 'SHAR_END'
X--- lib/direct/conf.c.orig	2007-12-15 14:30:28.000000000 +0200
X+++ lib/direct/conf.c	2008-03-16 14:31:28.000000000 +0200
X@@ -31,6 +31,8 @@
X #include <stdlib.h>
X #include <string.h>
X 
X+#include <signal.h>
X+
X #include <direct/conf.h>
X #include <direct/mem.h>
X #include <direct/util.h>
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-voodoo-manager.c
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-voodoo-manager.c << 'SHAR_END'
X--- lib/voodoo/manager.c.orig	2007-12-15 14:30:28.000000000 +0200
X+++ lib/voodoo/manager.c	2008-03-16 14:51:33.000000000 +0200
X@@ -186,7 +186,7 @@
X 
X      D_DEBUG( "Voodoo/Manager: Creating manager at %p.\n", manager );
X 
X-     if (setsockopt( fd, SOL_IP, IP_TOS, &tos, sizeof(tos) ) < 0)
X+     if (setsockopt( fd, IPPROTO_IP, IP_TOS, &tos, sizeof(tos) ) < 0)
X           D_PERROR( "Voodoo/Manager: Could not set IP_TOS!\n" );
X 
X      if (setsockopt( fd, SOL_TCP, TCP_NODELAY, &one, sizeof(one) ) < 0)
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-doc_Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-doc_Makefile.in << 'SHAR_END'
X--- docs/Makefile.in.orig	2008-06-02 14:05:50.000000000 +0200
X+++ docs/Makefile.in	2008-06-02 14:05:58.000000000 +0200
X@@ -681,7 +681,7 @@
X @HAVE_MAN2HTML_TRUE@	rm -f $(HTMLMANS)
X 
X @HAVE_MAN2HTML_TRUE@%.html: %
X-@HAVE_MAN2HTML_TRUE@	$(MAN2HTML) $* > $@
X+@HAVE_MAN2HTML_TRUE@	$(MAN2HTML) < $* > $@
X 
X @HAVE_MAN2HTML_FALSE@all-local:
X 
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-stream.c
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-stream.c << 'SHAR_END'
X--- lib/direct/stream.c.orig	2007-12-15 14:30:28.000000000 +0200
X+++ lib/direct/stream.c	2008-03-16 14:51:44.000000000 +0200
X@@ -429,7 +429,7 @@
X                          req.imr_multiaddr.s_addr = saddr->sin_addr.s_addr;
X                          req.imr_interface.s_addr = 0;
X 
X-                         err = setsockopt( fd, SOL_IP, IP_ADD_MEMBERSHIP, &req, sizeof(req) );
X+                         err = setsockopt( fd, IPPROTO_IP, IP_ADD_MEMBERSHIP, &req, sizeof(req) );
X                          if (err < 0) {
X                               ret = errno2result( errno );
X                               D_PERROR( "Direct/Stream: Could not join multicast group (%u.%u.%u.%u)!\n",
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-idirectfbimageprovider_png.c
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-idirectfbimageprovider_png.c << 'SHAR_END'
X--- interfaces/IDirectFBImageProvider/idirectfbimageprovider_png.c.orig	2007-12-15 13:30:24.000000000 +0100
X+++ interfaces/IDirectFBImageProvider/idirectfbimageprovider_png.c	2010-03-29 21:00:24.000000000 +0200
X@@ -168,7 +168,7 @@
X static DFBResult
X Probe( IDirectFBImageProvider_ProbeContext *ctx )
X {
X-     if (png_check_sig( ctx->header, 8 ))
X+     if (!png_sig_cmp( ctx->header, 0, 8 ))
X           return DFB_OK;
X 
X      return DFB_UNSUPPORTED;
X@@ -636,7 +636,7 @@
X           if (data->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) {
X                u32        key;
X                png_colorp palette    = data->info_ptr->palette;
X-               png_bytep  trans      = data->info_ptr->trans;
X+               png_bytep  trans      = data->info_ptr->trans_alpha;
X                int        num_colors = MIN( MAXCOLORMAPSIZE,
X                                             data->info_ptr->num_palette );
X                u8         cmap[3][num_colors];
X@@ -661,7 +661,7 @@
X           }
X           else {
X                /* ...or based on trans rgb value */
X-               png_color_16p trans = &data->info_ptr->trans_values;
X+               png_color_16p trans = &data->info_ptr->trans_color;
X 
X                data->color_key = (((trans->red & 0xff00) << 8) |
X                                   ((trans->green & 0xff00)) |
X@@ -672,7 +672,7 @@
X      switch (data->color_type) {
X           case PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE: {
X                png_colorp palette    = data->info_ptr->palette;
X-               png_bytep  trans      = data->info_ptr->trans;
X+               png_bytep  trans      = data->info_ptr->trans_alpha;
X                int        num_trans  = data->info_ptr->num_trans;
X                int        num_colors = MIN( MAXCOLORMAPSIZE, data->info_ptr->num_palette );
X 
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-tools-dfbmaster.c
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-tools-dfbmaster.c << 'SHAR_END'
X--- tools/dfbmaster.c~
X+++ tools/dfbmaster.c
X@@ -27,6 +27,8 @@
X 
X #include <config.h>
X 
X+#include <signal.h>
X+
X #include <direct/messages.h>
X 
X #include <directfb.h>
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-interface.c
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-interface.c << 'SHAR_END'
X--- lib/direct/interface.c~
X+++ lib/direct/interface.c
X@@ -51,6 +51,9 @@
X #include <dlfcn.h>
X #endif
X 
X+#if !HAVE_DECL_PTHREAD_RECURSIVE_MUTEX_INITIALIZER_NP
X+#define PTHREAD_RECURSIVE_MUTEX_INITIALIZER_NP 0
X+#endif
X 
X D_DEBUG_DOMAIN( Direct_Interface, "Direct/Interface", "Direct Interface" );
X 
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-log.c
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-log.c << 'SHAR_END'
X--- lib/direct/log.c.orig	2007-03-03 22:29:45.000000000 +0200
X+++ lib/direct/log.c	2008-03-12 12:49:22.000000000 +0200
X@@ -49,6 +49,14 @@
X #include <direct/util.h>
X 
X 
X+#ifndef EAI_ADDRFAMILY
X+#define EAI_ADDRFAMILY   1
X+#endif
X+#ifndef EAI_NODATA
X+#define EAI_NODATA       7
X+#endif
X+
X+
X struct __D_DirectLog {
X      int            magic;
X 
SHAR_END
echo x devel/directfb/files/patch-configure
sed 's/^X//' > devel/directfb/files/patch-configure << 'SHAR_END'
X--- configure.orig	2008-03-12 17:28:51.000000000 +0200
X+++ configure	2008-03-12 17:32:16.000000000 +0200
X@@ -19439,7 +19439,8 @@
X 
X 
X # This can be used to rebuild libtool when needed
